title: salix × calliantha
intro: Salix × calliantha is a hybrid willow plant, resulting from the cross between two willow species, Salix alba and Salix caprea. The bark of this plant contains salicylic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which is the primary medicinal component of Salix × calliantha. The medicinal properties of Salix × calliantha have been used to treat various health conditions, including headaches, fever, and rheumatic pain, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and ease pain. Salix × calliantha can be prepared as a herbal remedy, either in the form of a decoction, infusion, or ointment, to take advantage of its health benefits.
